concepts.title: {Couple Names}
concepts.subtitle: {Wedding Date}
concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “first_kiss.jpg” (portrait, quality 88/100) the star. Photo w1 (first_kiss.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 88, 2 subjects. Signature Edition centers it with symmetrical balance and generous whitespace, framed with restraint in #FAF8F3 on #FAF8F3 — timeless, so this wedding day still feels right in ten years. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: romance. Tell a love story with elegance and timeless grace.
concepts.purchasePsychology: The version most families choose — timeless and universally loved. A natural centerpiece for a wedding reception. Recommended as a Framed. Made for the couple and their families. (wedding day)

layoutRecipe.arrangement: Central hero with a disciplined supporting grid

colorRecipe.guidance: Restrained gold on obsidian; refined, high-contrast, timeless. Gold as a hairline accent only.

typographyRecipe.headlineTreatment: elegant Cormorant Garamond display, high contrast, one headline
typographyRecipe.guidance: Classic, confident hierarchy; distance- and print-readable.

Luxury Gold lifts it into a cinematic spotlight with luxurious negative space and gold framing in #FAF8F3, so the wedding day feels as big as it was. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Family Legacy arranges the memories as a warm story — anchor moments, then story builders — with room around every face, honoring the wedding day across time. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. concepts.title: {Couple Names}

concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “first_kiss.jpg” (portrait, quality 88/100) the star. Photo w1 (first_kiss.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 88, 2 subjects. Modern Editorial gives it magazine-cover scale and deliberate asymmetry, with bold negative space and strong type — the wedding day, styled like a cover. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: romance. Tell a love story with elegance and timeless grace.
concepts.purchasePsychology: Made to share — it looks strongest on a phone screen and social feed before it ever reaches a wall. Recommended as a Digital download. Made for the couple and their families. (wedding day)

layoutRecipe.arrangement: Editorial asymmetry with an oversized hero

colorRecipe.guidance: Sharpest contrast, a single disciplined accent; gold as highlight only.

typographyRecipe.labelTreatment: bold sans labels; refined serif accent
typographyRecipe.guidance: Type as composition; strong scale contrast, magazine-grade.
